'''Buzzards''' were [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] used by the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] in the last stages of the [[New Sith Wars]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Buzzards.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Buzzard fighters chase after [[Torr Snapit]]'s transport.]]

They had long cylindrical bodies with two pairs of stubby wings near the rear. They were equipped with [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]].
Pilots often painted the noses of their fighters, making them look like predatory animals as an intimidation and demoralizing tactic.

==History==
Buzzards were used throughout the last stages of the war and participated in the [[First Battle of Ruusan]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}}
*[[Jedi vs. Sith 1|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 1]] {{1st}}
*''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Rule of Two (audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
